context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses logfmt parser (not regexp) for structured log formats, applies quantile_over_time with unwrap for percentile latency, uses topk for top-N endpoint ranking, and applies the offset modifier for historical comparison.

checklist.name: logfmt parser used
checklist.description: All queries that extract fields use the logfmt parser (| logfmt), not regexp or json

checklist.name: quantile_over_time for p95
checklist.description: Panel 1 uses quantile_over_time(0.95, ... | unwrap duration_ms ...) to compute the 95th percentile latency

checklist.name: unwrap used for numeric field
checklist.description: The latency query uses | unwrap duration_ms to extract the numeric field before quantile_over_time

checklist.name: topk for top endpoints
checklist.description: Panel 2 uses topk(10, ...) to select the top 10 slowest endpoints

checklist.name: sum by upstream for error rate
checklist.description: Panel 3 groups the error rate using sum by (upstream) or equivalent grouping on upstream

checklist.name: rate() for error rate panels
checklist.description: Panels 3 and 4 use rate() not count_over_time() for computing error rates

checklist.name: offset modifier for comparison
checklist.description: Panel 4 uses the offset modifier (e.g. [5m] offset 1d) to reference the same metric 24 hours ago

checklist.name: Subtraction for delta
checklist.description: Panel 4 subtracts the offset expression from the current expression using minus operator
